HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (of Kenneth Y. Estudillo) IS Off calendar. Enforcement is stayed pursuant to the automatic bankruptcy stay. Defendant filed a Bankruptcy petition on 5/24/11. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported = (301/PJB)

Off Calendar May-17-2011 Continued To May-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bosco Credit LLC.
No appearance by defendants Kenneth Y. Estudillo or Joy B. Estudillo, a/k/a Joy A. Bagnolestudillo, a/k/a Joy A. Bagnol, a/k/a Joy Bagnol Estudillo.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 30, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 30, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up was filed on July 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bosco Credit LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendants Kenneth Y. Estudillo and Joy B. Estudillo, a/k/a Joy A. Bagnolestudillo, a/k/a Joy A. Bagnol, a/k/a Joy Bagnol Estudillo, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,273.38.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,143.84.
Attorney Fees - $550.00.
Late Charges - $855.00.
Costs - $568.46, for a total judgment in the amount of $39,390.68.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
